expectations.text: Skill asks for the missing SPEC_FILE before proceeding
expectations.evidence: Skill halted at Step 1, correctly identified SPEC_FILE as missing, asked user for path

expectations.text: Skill does NOT generate any output files without the spec
expectations.evidence: No output files created; only response.txt with user question

expectations.text: Skill recognises project name was provided and does not ask again
expectations.evidence: Response asked only for SPEC_FILE; PROJECT_NAME not re-requested
